titles.title: Geomorphometry.jl: Analyzing and visualizing the shape of the Earth in Julia.

citation.article_title: Priority-Flood: An Optimal Depression-Filling and Watershed-Labeling Algorithm for Digital Elevation Models

citation.author: Burrough
citation.unstructured_citation: Burrough, P. A., McDonnell, R. A., & Lloyd, C. D. (2015). Principles of Geographical Information Systems. OUP Oxford. ISBN: 978-0-19-874284-5

citation.unstructured_citation: Jenson, S. K., & Domingue, J. O. (1988). Extracting Topographic Structure from Digital Elevation Data for Geographic Information System Analysis. PHOTOGRAMMETRIC ENGINEERING.

IEEE Transactions on Geoscience and Remote Sensing, 41(4), 872–882. https://doi.org/10.1109/TGRS.2003.810682
